enablePushUpdates.title: Enable push updates
enablePushUpdates.description: Poll Dwelo in the background and push changed states to Apple Home. Disable to use fetch-on-read behavior only.

statePollMs.title: How often to poll Dwelo for device state (milliseconds)
statePollMs.description: Shared background polling interval for locks, switches, and thermostats. Values below 10000 are raised to 10000.

pushDeviceTypes.title: Device types with push updates
pushDeviceTypes.description: Advanced troubleshooting option. Choose which Dwelo device categories use background polling to push state changes to Apple Home. Clear all categories to disable background polling.

onGetStrategy.title: HomeKit read strategy
onGetStrategy.description: Advanced troubleshooting option. cached-first is recommended; always-live fetches Dwelo for every HomeKit read; cache-only never fetches during HomeKit reads.

lockPollMs.title: Deprecated: lock status poll interval (milliseconds)
lockPollMs.description: Deprecated. Use statePollMs instead. Used as a backwards-compatible alias when statePollMs is not set.

logThermostatSensorInventory.title: Log thermostat sensor inventory
logThermostatSensorInventory.description: Debug option that logs thermostat sensor names and sanitized values without logging tokens or raw API responses.
